offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, vendor risk causes late orders, which leads to supplier penalties. We provide vendor assessments instead of manual assessments and monitoring.
problem: Risk of third-party vendor issues affecting order fulfillment
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Participate in forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try vendor assessment checklist on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing vendor data
